name: Aira Harune
description: Aira is a junior high school girl who was scouted by a man named Jun to be a Prism Star. She is very clumsy and not very good at sports. Aira always tries to look at the bright side and is a huge fan of Mion. She is very naive but is so considerate of everyone. She has a younger brother who teases her and two little twin sisters who cheer her on. She may be absurdly clumsy but she is very good at coordinating clothes which she may have gotten from her former prism show stylist mother, Omi Harune

name: Alice Margatroid

description: A genuine magician. Alice was once human and became a youkai magician through training. She is young as a youkai, so she is considerate towards humans and still behaves as one of them would. She is a kind of so called humanoid youkai. Her house is crammed with a lot of dolls. The sight is so spooky that it scares rare visitors away. The house of dolls is strangest even in the forest of the bizarre. It's no wonder that they tend to run away from there. description: Akkun is a high school boy who acts like a tsundere to his girlfriend Nontan. He regularly scolds her and is harsh to her; however, secretly he is infatuated with her and likes to follow her around. He has light brown hair with a tuft on top.

name: Candy
description: Candy is the main fairy mascot of Smile Pretty Cure!. She came to Earth in search of Pretty Cure to help her in collecting the Cure Decor, in order to defend the peace in Märchenland. She loves fashion and dolling herself up. Candy ends her sentences with "kuru~". ~!It is later revealed that she is the future queen of Märchenland.!~

name: Capeta Taira
description: Taira Kappeita, or Capeta, was a 4th grader boy. He had lost his mother when he had been very little. Although he pretended to be tough in front of his father, actually he felt lonely. One day, his father brought junk parts home from his workplace and made a racing cart. Soon, they went to a circuit to drive the cart. However, Capeta found that its frame was bent and it could hardly run straight. But, with his technique he managed the cart. Furthermore, he followed soon after the fast cart and h

name: Chinatsu Kuramoto
description: Kei's little sister and Makoto's cousin. Originally wary of Makoto and thought of her as strange when they first met, she quickly came to like her after Makoto took her flying on a broom. She is fascinated with magic and eagerly watches Makoto when she does something that involves witchcraft or something supernatural. She also enjoys sweets.

name: Citron
description: Clemont is a Gym Leader of the Kalos region. He likes science and building new devices. He is the older brother of Bonnie. He isn't interested in strength, he enjoys spending his time with his Pokémon. (Source: Pokemon Wiki)

name: Diva
description: Saya's twin sister and the story's main antagonist, Diva was born in 1833. She provides the Delta67 (derived from her blood) which is used to transform people into Chiropterans. When she was born she was kept in an isolated tower as part of an experiment. Because of that she hated Joel, such that when Saya freed her she slaughtered him and the people at his birthday party. Her isolation left her childish and socially inept as well as ignorant of the moral ramifications of her actions. ~!She rape

name: Douren
description: Douren is a member of the Dangaishu and is one of the Four Beasts General. He can turn into a tiger.

name: Gensai Kuroki
description: Gensai Kuroki is a renowned assassin in the criminal underworld and the affiliated fighter for Motorhead Motors in the Kengan Annihilation Tournament.

name: Gloomy
description: Gloomy, an abandoned little bear, is rescued by Pitty (the little boy). At first, he is cute and cuddly, but becomes wilder as he grows up. Since bears do not become attached to people like dogs by nature, Gloomy attacks Pitty even though he is the owner. So Gloomy has blood on him from biting and/or scratching Pitty. (Source: Cube Works)

name: Gyu-Hwan Han
description: Gyu-Hwan Han is the main protagonist of Shotgun Boy and a student at Yeongchan High. He is the school outcast who stumbles upon a major secret.

name: Hakuno Kishinami
description: Hakuno Kishinami is the protagonist of Fate/Extra and Fate/Extra CCC, acting as the Master of Saber, Archer, Caster, or Gilgamesh depending on which is chosen. The character is male or female depending on player preference, and their name and a nickname can be selected as well. name: Haruko Daichi
description: Haruko is a frequent visitor of the Lounge and a member of the Cat Clowder. After being commissioned by Anonymous, she renovated the Lounge with friends she met through a gay community on Twitter. She's living with her wife, Saki, who she met through that community.
mediaTitles: Our Dreams at Dusk: Shimanami Tasogare

name: Haruna Annaka
description: Yuuko and Mio's classmate. She always wears a big red ribbon. Her common reaction to something that surprises/shocks her consists in expressing herself by making the sound "ehhhhh"

name: Hippolyta
description: The child of Ares, the god of war, and Otrera, a priestess of Artemis. She was the Queen of the Amazons, who was slain by Heracles on his quest to steal her sash. She was also the older sister of Penthesilea and many other amazons.
